NewsApp Documentation¶

A full-featured Django news platform with role-based access control, a RESTful API (JWT-authenticated), and automated tests.

Contents:

  • news.models
    • Relationships
    • Article
    • CustomUser
    • Newsletter
    • Publisher
    • Role
  • news.views

    • edit_article_view()
    • edit_newsletter_view()
    • edit_publisher_view()

    • login_view()
    • logout_view()

    • newsletter_list_view()
